talents.skill: Senet Strategy: Dance of a Thousand Nights

talents.burst: Dance of Abzendegi: Distant Dreams, Listening Spring
The Bell Tolls! The Hunt Is On!

Ascended Sample: Knight.name: Ascended Sample: Knight
Ascended Sample: Knight.description: A rare sample resulting from the alchemical activation of a substance.

Ascended Sample: Queen.name: Ascended Sample: Queen
Ascended Sample: Queen.description: A rare sample resulting from the alchemical activation of a substance.

Ascended Sample: Rook.name: Ascended Sample: Rook
Ascended Sample: Rook.description: A rare sample resulting from the alchemical activation of a substance.

Ashen Heart.name: Ashen Heart
Ashen Heart.description: A deformed fragment that contains powerful emotions. You obtained this from defeating Signora, who unleashed her original power.

Bloodjade Branch.name: Bloodjade Branch
Bloodjade Branch.description: Nurtured by the might of the dragon king, these bone branches glitter with strange, unique colors.

Counterfeit Resin.name: Counterfeit Resin
Counterfeit Resin.description: A resin recovered from the shattered depths of the Ley Lines after the defeat of the heretic hidden within Irminsul.

Daka's Bell.name: Daka's Bell
Daka's Bell.description: This ball joint, used to connect mechanical limbs together, is shaped almost like a bell. Though it may seem dainty, it can be used to carry an unimaginably large amount of energy.

Denial and Judgment.name: Denial and Judgment
Denial and Judgment.description: An earring that you picked up in the ruins after completing the duel against The Knave.

Dragon Lord's Crown.name: Dragon Lord's Crown
Dragon Lord's Crown.description: Horns created from hardened jade crystallized over a thousand years are the natural crown of the dragon king.

Dvalin's Claw.name: Dvalin's Claw
Dvalin's Claw.description: A claw from the Dragon of the East.

Dvalin's Plume.name: Dvalin's Plume
Dvalin's Plume.description: A feather from the tail of the Dragon of the East.

Dvalin's Sigh.name: Dvalin's Sigh
Dvalin's Sigh.description: A bit of power taken from the whirlwinds evoked by the Dragon of the East.

Elixir of the Heretic.name: Elixir of the Heretic
Elixir of the Heretic.description: A vial found in the heretical testing grounds after defeating the false god that usurped the moon.

Eroded Horn.name: Eroded Horn
Eroded Horn.description: The Lord of Eroded Primal Fire's blazing horn, cut off in the heat of battle.

Eroded Scale-Feather.name: Eroded Scale-Feather
Eroded Scale-Feather.description: A pitch-black scale that fell to the ground after the battle against the Lord of Eroded Primal Fire.

Eroded Sunfire.name: Eroded Sunfire
Eroded Sunfire.description: Though the battle with the Lord of Eroded Primal Fire has ended, this ring-shaped flame yet burns.

Everamber.name: Everamber
Everamber.description: A piece of amber taken from the oasis within Apep. Inside the amber, a small, long-extinct insect remains frozen in time.

Fading Candle.name: Fading Candle
Fading Candle.description: A candle that you picked up in the ruins after completing the duel against The Knave.

Gilded Scale.name: Gilded Scale
Gilded Scale.description: Scaled armor that grows naturally over mystical stone, tough and silent, and filled with the strength of the dragon king.

Hellfire Butterfly.name: Hellfire Butterfly
Hellfire Butterfly.description: A warped shard that houses great might. You obtained this from defeating Signora, who unleashed her original power.

Lightless Eye of the Maelstrom.name: Lightless Eye of the Maelstrom
Lightless Eye of the Maelstrom.description: A strange "substance" obtained from fighting against the All-Devouring Narwhal. Its actual weight far exceeds what would be expected given its size.

Lightless Mass.name: Lightless Mass
Lightless Mass.description: A fragment produced from the intense battle against the All-Devouring Narwhal.

Lightless Silk String.name: Lightless Silk String
Lightless Silk String.description: A slender strand that somehow ended up entangled on your weapon while fighting the All-Devouring Narwhal.

Madman's Restraint.name: Madman's Restraint
Madman's Restraint.description: A band found in the heretical testing grounds after defeating the false god that usurped the moon.

Mask of the Virtuous Doctor.name: Mask of the Virtuous Doctor
Mask of the Virtuous Doctor.description: A mask found in the heretical testing grounds after defeating the false god that usurped the moon.

Mirror of Mushin.name: Mirror of Mushin
Mirror of Mushin.description: The mirror that was set in Shouki no Kami's chest to separate him from the outside world. The mitsudomoe symbol is emblazoned on it as a deliberate show of status and might.

Molten Moment.name: Molten Moment
Molten Moment.description: A certain deformed fragment containing great might. You obtained this from defeating La Signora, who unleashed her original power.

Mudra of the Malefic General.name: Mudra of the Malefic General
Mudra of the Malefic General.description: A puppet joint obtained from the Plane of Euthymia. The gesture here symbolizes the concept that "one sees and one does."

Primordial Greenbloom.name: Primordial Greenbloom
Primordial Greenbloom.description: A primordial flower procured from the oasis within Apep.

Profaned Sprout.name: Profaned Sprout
Profaned Sprout.description: A sprig recovered from the shattered depths of the Ley Lines after the defeat of the heretic hidden within Irminsul.

Puppet Strings.name: Puppet Strings
Puppet Strings.description: Tubes that were inserted into the mechanical puppet's back. The colors that flow within them are sometimes dull, and at others, vibrant. The contrast is so great as to be fearful.

Ring of Boreas.name: Ring of Boreas
Ring of Boreas.description: A bit of crystallized ice from the Great Wolf King of the North.

Shadow of the Warrior.name: Shadow of the Warrior
Shadow of the Warrior.description: A fragment of power that you obtained from defeating Childe, who had unleashed the might of his Delusion.

Shard of a Foul Legacy.name: Shard of a Foul Legacy
Shard of a Foul Legacy.description: The shard of a weapon that you obtained from defeating Childe, who had unleashed the might of his Delusion.

Silken Feather.name: Silken Feather
Silken Feather.description: A crystal that you picked up in the ruins after completing the duel against The Knave.

Spirit Locket of Boreas.name: Spirit Locket of Boreas
Spirit Locket of Boreas.description: A bit of the Great Wolf King of the North's power drawn from its soul.

Tail of Boreas.name: Tail of Boreas
Tail of Boreas.description: A handful of tail scales from the Great Wolf King of the North.

Tears of the Calamitous God.name: Tears of the Calamitous God
Tears of the Calamitous God.description: A puppet joint obtained from the Plane of Euthymia. The gesture here is in the shape of the baleful Eye of Stormy Judgment.

The Cornerstone of Stars and Flames.name: The Cornerstone of Stars and Flames
The Cornerstone of Stars and Flames.description: "Heroes ignite the sacred flame, illuminating the world, yet eventually they shall rest, nestled among the stars."

The Meaning of Aeons.name: The Meaning of Aeons
The Meaning of Aeons.description: A small piece of headgear obtained once the dust settled in the Plane of Euthymia.

Tusk of Monoceros Caeli.name: Tusk of Monoceros Caeli
Tusk of Monoceros Caeli.description: The horn of a whale that you obtained from defeating Childe, who had unleashed the might of his Delusion.

Twisted Withered Branch.name: Twisted Withered Branch
Twisted Withered Branch.description: A withered branch recovered from the shattered depths of the Ley Lines after the defeat of the heretic hidden within Irminsul.

Worldspan Fern.name: Worldspan Fern
Worldspan Fern.description: A fern taken from the oasis within Apep's body.
